ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number assigned to the member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "contact_no" TEXT /* Contact number of the member */,
  "email_id" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the member */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the member */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date when the member joined */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the membership is up for renewal */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the member is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who holds the qualification */,
  "qualification_name" TEXT /* Name of the qualification */,
  "qualification_description" TEXT /* Description of the qualification */,
  "issuing_authority" TEXT /* Authority that issued the qualification */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* Date when the qualification was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the qualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifications_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who holds the certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "certification_description" TEXT /* Description of the certification */,
  "issuing_organization" TEXT /* Organization that issued the certification */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* Date when the certification was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_levels" (
  "membership_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership level */,
  "membership_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership level */,
  "membership_level_description" TEXT /* Description of the membership level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "training_program_description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program in hours */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits earned from the training program */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "training_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "training_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program being conducted */,
  "training_session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "training_session_location" TEXT /* Location of the training session */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor conducting the session */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the training session */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of enrollments in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_training_records" (
  "member_training_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member training record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who attended the training */,
  "training_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session attended */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Status of the training */,
  "certificate_issued" INTEGER /* Indicates if a certificate was issued */,
  "certificate_number" TEXT /* Certificate number if issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_training_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_training_records_training_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("training_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_training_records_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base" (
  "knowledge_base_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge base article */,
  "knowledge_base_title" TEXT /* Title of the knowledge base article */,
  "knowledge_base_content" TEXT /* Content of the knowledge base article */,
  "knowledge_base_author" TEXT /* Author of the knowledge base article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the article */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level required to view the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("knowledge_base_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base_access" (
  "knowledge_base_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge base access record */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who accessed the knowledge base */,
  "knowledge_base_id" INTEGER /* ID of the knowledge base article accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("knowledge_base_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_access_knowledge_base_id FOREIGN KEY ("knowledge_base_id") REFERENCES knowledge_base ("knowledge_base_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_access_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role that has the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_payments" (
  "member_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member payment */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_payments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newsletters" (
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newsletter */,
  "newsletter_title" TEXT /* Title of the newsletter */,
  "newsletter_content" TEXT /* Content of the newsletter */,
  "newsletter_date" TEXT /* Date of the newsletter */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the newsletter */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newsletter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newsletter_subscriptions" (
  "newsletter_subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newsletter subscription */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the newsletter subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date of subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newsletter_subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_newsletter_subscriptions_newsletter_id FOREIGN KEY ("newsletter_id") REFERENCES newsletters ("newsletter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_newsletter_subscriptions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)
